text: The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Locust St, to the South by Oakland Ave, to the East by Mercer Ave, and to the West by Main St. The subject is located in a neighborhood North of Weldon, IL proper. It is a single family detached ranch style house. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment.
